data_quality_notes: Proxy used: EN.CLC.MDAT.ZS (mean area protected in terrestrial sites important to biodiversity). Used WB indicator EN.CLC.MDAT.ZS as biodiversity protection proxy (n=166). True LBII (raster product at 1km resolution) was not accessible as country-level tabular data. A World Bank substitute indicator was used instead. Taxonomic bias toward vertebrates/plants is noted in PREDICTS; this substitute does not fully capture local biodiversity intactness.
summary: Using 'EN.CLC.MDAT.ZS (mean area protected in terrestrial sites important to biodiversity)' as a substitute for LBII, bivariate correlation with SPI is r=-0.145 (p=6.984e-02, n=158 countries). Spearman rho=-0.214 (p=7.035e-03). After controlling for log(GDP/capita): partial r=-0.073 (p=3.666e-01). Best functional form: linear. Verdict: rejected. Note: Results reflect the substitute proxy, not true LBII.
